SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion

Class DfAggregateUDFAdapter

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.DfAggregateUDFAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfAggregateUdfTrait
public final class DfAggregateUDFAdapter extends Object implements org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfAggregateUdfTrait
Adapts a user-implemented AggregateUDF to the Diplomat-generated DfAggregateUdfTrait interface for FFI callbacks.

  • Nested Class Summary
